mapper.select: select scd.sys_id, scd.common_cd, scd.common_nm from sys_common_detail scd left join sys_common_master scm on scm.sys_id = scd.link_sys_id where 1=1 and scm.common_cd = #{commonCd} and scd.delete_yn = 'N' and scd.use_yn = 'Y' order by scd.ord_no asc

select scd.sys_id, scd.common_cd, scd.common_nm from sys_common_detail scd left join sys_common_master scm on scm.sys_id = scd.link_sys_id where 1=1 and scm.sys_id = #{sysId} and scd.delete_yn = 'N' and scd.use_yn = 'Y' order by scd.ord_no asc
